title: Demo-JEPA: Joint-Embedding Predictive Architecture for One-Shot Cross-Embodiment Imitation
summary: Demo-JEPA proposes a framework for robotic imitation learning that interprets demonstrations as goal specifications rather than action reproductions, translating source visual demonstrations into target-compatible future latent trajectories using a JEPA-based world model. This enables robots with different morphologies to learn from diverse embodiments without requiring action-level correspondence between source and target. Evaluated on RLBench and real-world tasks, the method matches the performance of specialized planners while generalizing to novel scenarios.
